notes: Declared evolutive numerics for FreeGSNKE nl_solver/nlstepper. Default linear_only=true, n_steps=2, full_timestep_s=0.02 and min_dIy_dI=0.01 keep happy-path/smoke finite on MAST-U-like machines (longer windows can hang after linearization departure). snapshot_equilibria_every_n=0 disables mid-run PNG snapshots. Profile alpha_m/alpha_n/paxis/fvac are held from the inverse IC — never invented. Missing FAIR-MAST voltage channels use voltage_map default_V=0 (explicit zero-drive).
